Template Use Case/Title: green location NA Specific Missing Information on Packing Slip
Applicable SOPs: Template is not currently referenced within any SOPs
Text: Hi (supplier name) Thank you for reaching out regarding the shipping documents associated with PO XX. I appreciate your consideration for our mutual customer. I am happy to clarify. I would like to inform you that we recently released a software update to remove the customer's information from the packing slip. To remain compliant with privacy laws and the data minimization principle, we have removed this personal information from the packing slip because it is not required or necessary. Non-compliance with this principle becomes a risk for Wayfair each time a packing slip is left in the box e.g. during grading of a returned item and the packing slip displaying a previous customer's information is inadvertently shared with a new customer purchasing the item. Please note that packing slips are optional to include in shipments. I hope this helps address your questions, though you are welcome to reach back out should you need further assistance on this matter. If I've addressed all your needs for the time being, I hope you have a great day! Help us improve by sharing your feedback. You will receive an email shortly with a survey, or you can provide feedback on any closed tickets in Partner Home. We sincerely value your partnership. Best,

Template Use Case/Title: green location NA Specific Incorrect Label Count
Applicable SOPs: Template is not currently referenced within any SOPs
Text: Hi [Supplier Team] Thank you for reaching out about this label query. Please find the label document attached to this ticket. Please be informed that you can change the number of boxes/labels at any time in the Dropship Orders. To do so you can follow the steps below: Log into Partner Home. Navigate to Customer Orders > Dropship Orders. Enter the PO Number in the search field and click the Search button. Click on the PO Number. Select Print Documents which will open a new window. Select Edit Shipping Details. Change the carton count and select Done Editing. Generate the shipping documents to save updates. If the carton count for this item needs to be changed for future orders, please update the carton count via Partner Home. Please find the instructions on how to do so here: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/2949 . Thanks again for reaching out. This ticket is now marked as complete.
